content.en:
"Exchange Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold for low-quality Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items?"

Su Ya knew that the Sioux would definitely be willing to trade.

The background of the Su clan is not something that ordinary Dao realms can imagine, and countless people have collected a lot of low-quality fourth-order Dao rule items, but the side effects are too great, and most of them will die if they use them.

Who would dare to use it?

No Nine Folds Dao Realm would dare to use such a low-quality Fourth Sequence Dao Rule item.

"Lord Ye, I need to contact the elders of the Sioux Clan. "

Su Ya said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian is waiting here.

It didn't take long for the Sioux to respond, and that was to be willing to trade.

The next step is to negotiate how many low-quality Fourth Virtual Dao Rule items should be exchanged for this piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold.

Ye Tian was naturally a lion with his mouth wide open, wanting to obtain a large number of low-quality fourth-order supreme rule items, but the Su clan didn't want to give too much.

After all, the low-quality fourth-order supreme rule items can't be used by them now, but what if they can use them later!

Therefore, the two sides negotiated for a long time and finally reached a satisfactory result for both parties.

"A piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold in exchange for more than three hundred low-quality Fourth Sequence Dao Rule items. "

This is the result of Ye Tian's struggle.

One for three hundred, in the eyes of the Sioux, this is also a good deal.

After all, more than three hundred low-quality fourth-sequence supreme dao rules are useless, they are waste, and if they are exchanged for a piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold, they can cultivate a legendary Dao realm!

Even if it is the Sioux Clan, the number of legends to the Dao Realm will definitely not be very large.

Therefore, one more legend to the Dao realm will undoubtedly greatly enhance the strength of the Sioux clan.

Winter Night's Fortress.

A legendary Dao Realm of the Sioux Clan personally came here with more than three hundred low-quality Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

"Lord Ye Domain, this is the Qiming Ancestor of our Su Clan, you can call it Qiming Guzun. Su Ya summoned Ye Tiandao.

Ye Tian immediately said respectfully: "I've seen Qiming Guzun. "

"Ye Tian, don't say much, what about the Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold, let's trade it immediately!"

Qiming Ancient Venerable Road.

"Good!"

Ye Tian took out his piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold.

Qiming Guzun took a look at it, made sure that it was correct, and then took out more than three hundred pieces of his own low-quality fourth-order supreme path rules, not the same kind, but a variety of fourth-order supreme dao rule items, and the side effects were different, but almost all of them would destroy or kill the foundation of the ninefold supreme dao realm.

After the transaction was completed, Qiming Guzun left.

......

Sioux Domain.

Su Ya followed Qiming Guzun back.

"Ancestor, who will this piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold be used for?" Su Ya asked cautiously.

If it is the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao rule items obtained by Qiming Guzun himself, he can choose to refine them by himself, and most of the fourth sequence Supreme Dao rule items obtained by himself in the Legend to Dao Realm are used by himself to enhance his fourth sequence Supreme Dao rules.

If not, how can the fourth sequence of the Supreme Dao Rule realm be elevated, and how will the third sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items be comprehended in the future?

However, this fourth-order Supreme Dao Rule item was exchanged for the family's resources, and it had to be given to other families that met the requirements of the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm Enlightenment, and Qiming Guzun himself would not use it.

Qiming Guzun smiled and said, "At present, there are only two people in the Su clan who have cultivated the fifth sequence of supreme dao rules to the ten-percent realm or close to the ten-percent realm, one is your father Su Xu, and the other is Su Jingang in the clan. This transaction was facilitated by you, and there is a high probability that your father will use the Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold in the clan. "

"Thank you, Ancestor!"

Su Ya thanked.

Every Dao Realm is very selfish, and she is no exception, she naturally hopes that the clan can give this piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold to her father.

Of course, if she used her Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, she wouldn't be willing to.

Soon after.

After internal discussion among the Su people, this piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold was still given to Su Xu, Su Ya's father.

And after Su Xu obtained this piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold, he immediately went to retreat and comprehend the rules of the fourth sequence of the Dao.

If nothing else, after tens of thousands of Dao eras, the Su clan will give birth to a new legendary Dao realm powerhouse.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian used those low-quality fourth-order supreme dao rule items of the Su clan to silently comprehend the fourth-sequence supreme dao rules, scrapping one copy body after another, but the fourth-sequence supreme dao rules were steadily improving.

The Lost Realm.

Ye Tian found another fourth-sequence supreme rule item-Soul Devouring Dao Wood, this fourth-sequence supreme rule item was only of medium quality, and the side effects were relatively large, so the value was far inferior to the Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold, and no one wanted it when it was traded.

Therefore, Ye Tian used it himself.

The years passed.

Ye Tian found more and more good things in the Lost Domain, but in the depths of the Lost Domain, the copy body occasionally encountered legendary creatures, so he was killed by them, losing one copy body after another.

Unconsciously, the 10,000 years of the Dao Era have passed.

Ye Tian had already consumed a lot of Lost Gold Leaf, but his space-time glow fish had found the Lost Gold Leaf again, so there was no need to worry about the Lost Gold Leaf in a short period of time.

this day.

A copy of Ye Tian's body came out of the Lost Domain, and then contacted the Longyan Ancient Emperor.

He promised the Ancient Emperor of Longyan to give him a hundred square Longyan Lin Stones, so he naturally wanted to give it to him.

Of course, the Longyan Ancient Emperor also had to promise to give him a place as a deacon of the Line Origin Domain Alliance.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

When Ye Tian summoned himself to gather a hundred square Longyan Lin Stones, the Longyan Ancient Emperor immediately came over.

"Hahaha, Ye Tian, have you found a hundred points of Longyan Lin Stone?"

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan asked urgently.

"Give!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a hundred square dragon rock lin stones were taken out.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan confirmed that it was correct and put it away, "Ye Tian, your deacon quota, I will operate it, and it will be implemented soon." "

Immediately after, the Longyan Ancient Emperor asked again: "Ye Tian, do you have more Longyan Lin Stones in your hands, I can pay more treasure resources to exchange them." "

"Yes!" Ye Tian smiled and said, "Longyan Ancient Emperor, if you need it, you can trade the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Item, and you don't need a high-quality, low-quality Fourth Void Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Item." "

"The low-quality Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, the one with the biggest side effects, can also be?" asked the Longyan Ancient Emperor.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

"A low-quality fourth-order Dao rule item in exchange for ten cubic meters of Longyan Linshi. "The Ancient Emperor of Longyan proposed this transaction price.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Immediately after, in the stunned eyes of the Longyan Ancient Emperor, Ye Tian took out six hundred square Longyan Lin Stones.
